title: Completion signals
acceptance_checks: echo "Manual review: confirm no legacy naming in chunk scope files"

grep -E '<pm>COMPLETE</pm>|<pm>GUTTER</pm>' puppet-master-rs/src/platforms/runner.rs puppet-master-rs/src/core/orchestrator.rs puppet-master-rs/src/core/prompt_builder.rs puppet-master-rs/src/core/execution_engine.rs puppet-master-rs/src/platforms/output_parser.rs puppet-master-rs/examples/output_parser_usage.rs || true
cd puppet-master-rs && cargo check && cargo test
evidence_required: cargo test exit code and brief output

title: Commit prefix
acceptance_checks: echo "Manual review: confirm no legacy naming in commit_formatter.rs"
grep 'pm:' puppet-master-rs/src/git/commit_formatter.rs
cd puppet-master-rs && cargo check && cargo test

title: Default branch naming pattern
acceptance_checks: echo "Manual review: confirm no legacy naming patterns in the listed files"
grep 'pm/{tier}/{id}' puppet-master-rs/src/config/gui_config.rs puppet-master-rs/src/types/config.rs
cd puppet-master-rs && cargo check && cargo test

title: Build env vars

grep 'PM_BUILD_' puppet-master-rs/build.rs
grep 'PM_BUILD_' puppet-master-rs/src/build_info.rs
cd puppet-master-rs && cargo check && cargo test

title: Phase 1 misc

title: ProjectDirs triplet

grep 'ProjectDirs::from("com", "puppetmaster", "Puppet Master")' puppet-master-rs/src/utils/project_paths.rs puppet-master-rs/src/install/app_paths.rs puppet-master-rs/src/doctor/checks/runtime_check.rs puppet-master-rs/src/config/default_config.rs puppet-master-rs/src/projects/persistence.rs || true

acceptance_checks: echo "Manual review: confirm no legacy naming in the listed files"

title: .cursor
acceptance_checks: python3 -c "import sys; from pathlib import Path; r=Path('.'); fs=['.cursor/MCP-CLI-vs-EXTENSION-PATHS.md','.cursor/CLAUDE_EXTENSION_AND_MCP.md','.cursor/commands/CHECK_STATUS.md']; refpath='Ref'+'erence/'; legacy=['ra'+'lph:','<'+'ra'+'lph'+'>','</'+'ra'+'lph'+'>']; [print('MISSING:', f) or sys.exit(1) for f in fs if not (r/f).exists()]; [print('HAS refpath:', f) or sys.exit(1) for f in fs if refpath in (r/f).read_text(encoding='utf-8',errors='replace')]; [print('HAS legacy token:', f) or sys.exit(1) for f in fs if any(t in (r/f).read_text(encoding='utf-8',errors='replace') for t in legacy)]; [print('NO Puppet Master:', f) or sys.exit(1) for f in fs if 'Puppet Master' not in (r/f).read_text(encoding='utf-8',errors='replace')]; print('OK: .cursor chunk checks passed')"
evidence_required: Python acceptance check exit code and output

title: Widget refs and evidence/audits
acceptance_checks: echo "Manual review: confirm no legacy naming in the listed files"
grep 'Puppet Master' WIDGETS_VISUAL_REFERENCE.md WIDGETS_QUICK_REFERENCE.md 2>/dev/null || true
grep 'pm.*commit' .puppet-master/audits/integration-paths.md .puppet-master/audits/integration-paths.json 2>/dev/null || true

title: Update path references after rename
acceptance_checks: grep -l 'workingDirectory\|rootDir\|projectRoot' .puppet-master/puppet-master.yaml puppet-master-rs/puppet-master.yaml .puppet-master/audits/wiring.json .puppet-master/audits/integration-paths.json 2>/dev/null || true
evidence_required: optional grep for old root path in audits
